category_sources: source_facts.description describes Woof! as a Doom source port; official README says Woof! continues the MBF Doom source port for modern systems.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses This is Woof!; source_facts.description also uses Woof!.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes synopsis, build, feature, and usage information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Woof! as a Doom source port derived from Boom/MBF/WinMBF for modern systems.
